THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALLOWAY, NATHANIEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 988 HOWARD ST, #18, STAYED UNTIL SEP-30-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT. DOES NOT VACATE PREMISES BY 9/30/97, 5:00PM PLTF. MAY FILE AN AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR UNPAID RENT AND COSTS IN THE AMOUND OF $739.88. (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS)
